final:
// // This module implements a 4-bit counter with load and clear functionalities. When the CLK signal has a falling edge, if the CTRL input is deasserted, the output Q is set to zero. If LOAD is deasserted, the counter loads the value from the 4-bit input D into Q. If neither CTRL nor LOAD is deasserted, Q decrements by one on each clock cycle, effectively counting downwards.
module top_module(
    input CLK,
    input CTRL,
    input LOAD,
    input [3:0] D,
    output reg [3:0] Q
);always @(posedge CLK) begin
    if (CTRL) begin
        Q <= 4'b0;
    end else if (LOAD) begin
        Q <= D;
    end else begin
        Q <= Q + 1;
    end
end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a 4-bit counter with load and clear functionalities. When the CLK signal has a falling edge, if the CTRL input is deasserted, the output Q is set to zero. If LOAD is deasserted, the counter loads the value from the 4-bit input D into Q. If neither CTRL nor LOAD is deasserted, Q decrements by one on each clock cycle, effectively counting downwards.
